footer.brandTagline: Minimal design, maximum impact. Thoughtfully crafted essentials for everyday comfort.

hero.fragrantLilies: Fragrant lilies of the valley to your door

delivery.question: How fast do you deliver?
delivery.answer: Orders placed before 2 PM are delivered the same day in Olomouc area. Other locations 1-2 business days.

freshness.question: How do you guarantee flower freshness?
freshness.answer: All flowers are sourced directly from growers and processed on delivery day. We guarantee freshness for at least 7 days.

returns.question: Can I return flowers?
returns.answer: If you are not satisfied with the quality, contact us within 24 hours of delivery and we will resolve it — exchange or refund.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept credit cards, bank transfers and cash on delivery. Everything is secured with SSL encryption.

custom.question: Can you create a custom bouquet?
custom.answer: Of course! Contact us with your ideas and we will create a bouquet exactly to your wishes.

review1.name: Marie Nováková
review1.review: Beautiful fresh flowers, fast delivery. I order regularly and have never been disappointed.

review2.name: Jan Dvořák
review2.review: I surprised my wife with a bouquet for our anniversary. She was delighted! The flowers lasted over a week.

review3.name: Petra Svobodová
review3.review: The funeral arrangement was beautiful and dignified. Thank you for the sensitive approach and quick handling.

about.title: About Zahradnictví Hnojice
about.description: We are a family garden center with a long tradition. We grow and arrange flowers with love and care to bring joy to your every day.
